# Learn My Students

> Master student names and faces with spaced repetition flashcards.

A free, privacy-first PWA for university instructors. All data stays on-device.

## Links

- App: https://learn-my-students.vercel.app/app/
- Demo: https://learn-my-students.vercel.app/app/?demo=1
- Source: https://github.com/jtangen/learn-my-students

## What This Is

A static web app (no backend, no build step) that helps university instructors learn student names through spaced repetition flashcards. Instructors upload student photos (ZIP or folder) named `LastName, FirstName (StudentID).jpg`, and the app creates progressive-difficulty flashcards using the FSRS v4.5 algorithm.

## Key Architecture

- Zero-build static site with ES modules
- IndexedDB via Dexie.js for photo/progress storage (no server)
- FSRS v4.5 spaced repetition in `app/js/fsrs.js`
- Jaro-Winkler + Double Metaphone fuzzy matching in `app/js/matching.js`
- Web Speech API for pronunciation (no external services)
- Service worker for offline PWA support

## File Structure

```
app/index.html          - App shell (5 screens)
app/manifest.json       - PWA manifest
app/sw.js               - Service worker (cache-first)
app/css/styles.css      - All styles
app/js/app.js           - Entry point, routing, screen management
app/js/db.js            - Dexie.js IndexedDB (classes, students, fsrsCards, sessions, settings)
app/js/fsrs.js          - FSRS v4.5 algorithm (createNewCard, reviewCard, Grade, State)
app/js/scheduler.js     - Session scheduling, batch intro, 4 difficulty phases
app/js/quiz.js          - Quiz UI (study, multiple choice, hinted recall, full recall, reverse)
app/js/import.js        - ZIP/folder import, filename parser, thumbnail generation
app/js/matching.js      - Jaro-Winkler, Double Metaphone, nickname table, matchName()
app/js/speech.js        - Web Speech API wrapper
app/js/stats.js         - Streaks, daily goals, session summaries, milestones
app/js/ui.js            - Shared UI helpers (showScreen, showToast, etc.)
index.html              - Landing/marketing page
styles.css              - Landing page styles
```

## Photo Format

Files must be named: `LastName, FirstName (StudentID).jpg`
Example: `Smith, Jane (12345678).jpg`

The parser is in `app/js/import.js`, function `parseStudentFromName()`.

## Running Locally

Serve the project root with any static HTTP server:
```
python -m http.server 8000
```
Then visit http://localhost:8000/app/

## For UQ Staff

Download student headshots from portal.my.uq.edu.au:
1. Log in → My courses → Select course
2. Course Information → Student headshots tab
3. Download .zip (already in correct filename format)

## Privacy

All student data stays in the browser's IndexedDB. No server calls, no analytics, no accounts. FERPA and Australian Privacy Act compliant. Photos are stored as Blob objects and never transmitted.

## Tech Details

- FSRS v4.5: 17-parameter model, power-law forgetting curve, card states (new → learning → review → relearning)
- Progressive difficulty: study (4s view) → MC (4 options) → hinted recall (first letter) → full typed recall
- Fuzzy matching thresholds: Jaro-Winkler ≥0.92 correct, 0.85-0.92 almost, Double Metaphone for phonetic
- Batch intro: 6 new students per session, ~75% review / 25% new interleaving
- Daily goals: casual (5), regular (15), intense (30) reviews
- Streaks: minimum 5 reviews to count, 2 freeze days, replenish every 7 days
